description: Add persistent notification read state with badge, list, filters, and cleanup actions.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state stored across sessions so unread and read items stay consistent after refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification persistence stores whether each notification is read or unread for the current user.
Stored notification read state survives sign-out and sign-in cycles for the same user account.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add notification read-state update actions
userStories.description: As a user, I want read and unread changes saved immediately so notification state remains accurate between sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend actions can mark one notification read or unread for the current user.
Read-state updates persist to stored notification data and reject invalid notification identifiers.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge entry point
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge on the notification entry point so I can see outstanding updates at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Unread badge shows the current unread count from persisted notification read state.
Badge hides or shows zero-state behavior according to existing navigation patterns.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Open notification list surface
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open a notification list so I can review recent updates in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list opens from the badge or notification entry point and renders recent notifications.
Each notification row reflects stored read or unread state when the list loads.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter notification list by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notification list results by read state so I can focus on unread or previously handled updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list offers filter options for all, unread, and read notifications.
Applying a filter shows only notifications matching the chosen read state.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so stale handled updates leave the notification list.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear action removes or archives only notifications currently marked read.
Unread notifications remain visible after clear completes and badge count updates accordingly.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
